title: Blackout's Backpacks
description: A mod that adds some backpacks!
body:
# Blackout's Backpacks
This mod adds Backpacks to Minecraft!
Adds Leather, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Emerald, Netherite and Ender Backpacks.
If Chaos Awakens is installed Amethyst and Ruby Backpacks.


Need a server to play with your friends? You can go rent a server from BisectHosting.
25% off with your first month using my Referral Code!


## FAQ and Updates
### Updates
#### 1.16.5 - v2.1.0
- Re-added Emerald Backpack without requiring Chaos Awakens.
- Made Backpacks easier to craft.
- Added Backpack Upgrade items to upgrade Backpacks.
- Leather Backpack can now be made with Leather or Rabbit Hide.
- Backpacks now all have a width of 12 slots instead of a width of 9 slots on each row.
- Fixed bugs including:
  - Backpack deleting itself when attempting to open in offhand.
  - Not being able to place many blocks and items into backpack.
  - Fixed trying to open a backpack then quickly switching to another item opening a UI with 0 slots and sometimes crashing the game.
#### 1.16.5 - v2.0.0
- Added Tigers Eye Backpack between Emerald and Amethyst.
- Swapped order of Netherite and Emerald Backpacks.
- Emerald Backpack now isn't craftable and doesn't exist unless you have Chaos Awakens installed. If you are playing without Chaos Awakens and have an Emerald Backpack upgrade it to Netherite before updating to this version.
- Fixed Ruby Backpack Advancement with newest versions of Chaos Awakens.
#### 1.16.5 - v1.1.0
- Fixed bug causing Backpacks to be opened twice before being updated. Their size is now upgraded upon the first opening after being upgraded instead of the second opening.
- Backpacks can no longer be placed in the other backpacks.
#### 1.16.5 - v1.0.0
- Mod Release.
- Adds 9 backpacks. 7 Vanilla Backpacks and 2 require the Chaos Awakens mod.


### FAQ:
#### Can I suggest a feature?
You can suggest a feature on my Discord.
#### Can I use this mod in my mod pack?
Yes, just link to this page and give me a heads up!
#### Can I do a mod review on it?
I mean it is just Backpacks but sure.
#### Will more backpacks be added?
Very Likely.
#### What mods are supported?
- Vanilla Minecraft
- Chaos Awakens

 

## Questions?

You can join my discord! https://discord.gg/5uMtag9

Ask us on the Chaos Awakens discord in the #chaos-addons-discussion channel! https://discord.gg/hnCKD4M87R

You may also hang out, suggest new ideas for Chaos Awakens, and get unique announcements for Chaos Awakens there!

### Chaos Awakens Website: https://chaosawakens.github.io/
